channel.title: IPhone Parental Controls on SafeScreenFamily - Protect Your Kids Online
channel.description: Recent content in IPhone Parental Controls on SafeScreenFamily - Protect Your Kids Online

item.title: How to Set Up iPhone Parental Controls: Step-by-Step Guide for 2026
item.description:
So your kid has an iPhone (or is about to get one), and you want to make sure they’re safe without turning the thing into an expensive paperweight. Good news: Apple’s built-in parental controls are actually pretty solid in 2026 – if you know where to find everything and how to set it up properly.

This guide walks you through every setting that matters, step by step. No tech background required. If you can send a text message, you can do this.

item.title: The Complete Guide to Parental Controls in 2026 — Every Device, Every Platform
item.description:
The Complete Guide to Parental Controls in 2026 — Every Device, Every Platform

If you’re like me, you’ve stood in your living room and counted the screens. Phone, tablet, laptop, gaming console, smart TV — and that’s just what one kid uses before dinner. The digital world our children navigate is enormous, and setting up parental controls on every single device can feel like a full-time job.

I’ve spent years configuring, testing, and reconfiguring parental controls across our household. This guide is everything I wish someone had handed me on day one: a single, plain-English walkthrough for locking down every major device and platform your family is likely to use in 2026.
